title: aglaia formosana
intro: Aglaia formosana, also known as the Formosa aglaia or Taiwan aglaia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is a tree native to Taiwan, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of the plant contain flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Aglaia formosana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system.
